transport_tier_legend.S: Metro direct to Amsterdam Zuid (no transfer) — top preference
transport_tier_legend.A: Train ~1 stop / minimal hops to Zuid — e.g. Hoofddorp Centraal
transport_tier_legend.B: ~1h train (or drive) OK — Almere, Zaandam, Den Haag suburbs, etc.
transport_tier_legend.watchlist: Compare only; unlikely to visit (e.g. far Rotterdam suburbs)

zones.label: Amsterdam Zuidoost (Bijlmer)
zones.zuid_commute_note: Metro 50/54 direct to Amsterdam Zuid ~10 min
zones.caution: 1980s blocks OK with discount; prefer 2000+ where possible

zones.label: Amsterdam Zuidoost (Ganzenhoef / Gaasperplas)
zones.zuid_commute_note: Metro via Ganzenhoef — direct line toward Zuid, no transfer

zones.label: Hoofddorp Centraal area
zones.zuid_commute_note: Train Hoofddorp → Amsterdam Zuid ~1 stop / ~10–15 min

zones.label: Hoofddorp Floriande
zones.zuid_commute_note: Bus/bike to Hoofddorp station then train to Zuid

zones.label: Almere
zones.zuid_commute_note: Train Almere → Amsterdam Centraal/Zuid ~30–40 min; within ~1h OK

zones.label: Zaandam
zones.zuid_commute_note: Train to Amsterdam + metro to Zuid ~25–35 min total

zones.label: Den Haag Ypenburg
zones.zuid_commute_note: Drive ~35–40 min to Zuid; large modern stock

zones.label: Utrecht Leidsche Rijn
zones.zuid_commute_note: Train via Utrecht ~45–55 min to Zuid

zones.label: Amstelveen (metro toward Zuid)
zones.zuid_commute_note: Metro/tram connection toward Amsterdam Zuid — verify line at listing

zones.label: Gouda
zones.zuid_commute_note: ~1h train; mostly older stock — check build year
zones.caution: Often pre-2000; only if label B+ confirmed
